abilities.description: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME this turn.

effect.description: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME this turn.
effect.name: PreventDamage

abilities.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME. Activate only during your upkeep.

replacements.description: For each 1 damage that would be dealt to CARDNAME, if it has a +1/+1 counter on it, remove a +1/+1 counter from it and prevent that 1 damage.
